posts.author: yogesh_bansal
posts.text: IREDA Sell or HOLD — Hold it. Business is fine — profits up 38% last quarter, renewable energy story intact. Stock fell due to sentiment, not fundamentals. ₹207 was a peak entry, so breakeven needs 2–3 years of patience. If it’s long-term money, sit tight. If you need the capital, trim half and move on.

posts.author: Ensotrade
posts.text: IREDA Sell or HOLD — IREDA represents a compelling structural investment opportunity despite short-term technical noise, as the company occupies a monopolistic position in India’s renewable energy financing ecosystem with explicit government backing and policy tailwinds. The fundamental thesis is strengthened by 67% YoY net profit growth and strategic alignment with India’s decarbonization agenda, creating a durable competitive moat. While technicals show pre-market selling pressure and derivative neutrality, these reflect short-term volatility rather than structural weakness in a stock with 4…
